_comment: Grandfathered proxy<T>() call sites in extensionClient.ts. Each entry is a raw proxy<T> call that predates tryRequest/validatedRequest helpers (added v2.25.22). New methods must NOT appear here — use tryRequest<T>() or validatedRequest<T>() instead.

allowlist.justification: Caller in getDiagnostics.ts checks null. Diagnostic[] shape validated by TypeScript. Low mismatch risk — array of well-typed objects.
allowlist.todo: Migrate to validatedRequest<Diagnostic[]> with isDiagnosticArray predicate

allowlist.justification: Caller checks null. TabInfo[] shape is a flat array of {uri, languageId, isDirty}.
allowlist.todo: Migrate to validatedRequest<TabInfo[]> with isTabInfoArray predicate

allowlist.justification: Boolean primitive — no shape mismatch possible beyond null/non-null.
allowlist.todo: Low priority — boolean proxy is safe

allowlist.justification: Caller checks null. Shape risk exists if handler changes AIComment fields.
allowlist.todo: Migrate to validatedRequest<AIComment[]> with isAICommentArray predicate

allowlist.justification: Small inline shape — 2 string fields. Mismatch would produce undefined fields (base64/mimeType), not silent wrong data.
allowlist.todo: Migrate to validatedRequest with inline predicate: r => typeof r.base64 === 'string' && typeof r.mimeType === 'string'

allowlist.justification: DebugState is a complex nested type. High migration priority — shape drift here could corrupt debugger state.
allowlist.todo: HIGH: migrate to validatedRequest<DebugState> with isDebugState predicate checking required fields

allowlist.justification: string[] — only mismatch risk is non-string elements. Caller just displays the list.
allowlist.todo: Migrate to validatedRequest<string[]> with Array.isArray + every-string predicate
